extortion.description: Chevalier Machinery Inc. conducts all manufacturing, R&D, engineering, prototyping, in our 35,000 square foot facility. We take pride in the highest quality components and economical prices we bring to our customers, and we are proud to have a quality system that is certified to the ISO 9001:2008 and SGS standard. . Email us for any questions you might have and we are always glad to be in contact.
